name: 暗影双匕（★） | 外表生锈
nameZh: 暗影双匕（★） | 外表生锈
descriptionEn: Designed for efficient brutality, using a push dagger is as simple as throwing a punch or two. This memento from Siege is still perfectly operational although the exterior surfaces have rusted. Scars build character
descriptionZh: 专为高效行凶设计，手推短匕用起来就和挥一两记重拳一样简单。 这把来自围攻之势的纪念武器可以用一句话来形容：“败絮其外，金玉其中”。 疤痕塑造品格
